method: Choropleth map showing churn rates by city with population size encoding + Box plot of age vs churn_status
objective: Identify geographic patterns in churn rates while analyzing age distribution differences between churned/stayed customers

method: Scatter plot: CLTV vs Tenure with customer_status color encoding. Binned tenure axis (0-12,13-24,25+ months)
objective: Understand relationship between customer longevity and lifetime value retention patterns

method: Stacked bar chart: Churn categories grouped by internet type with streaming service count as bar height
objective: Identify service configuration patterns leading to different churn reasons
